Dingding has unwittingly helped her into luring the group to this remote spot, where help is perpetually non-existent.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 55

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 56

programme.title: Reaching the Unreached - EP 2

programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ketika Ilmu Padi Mbaknya Buat Aku Melamar
programme.desc: Ziya (Shanice Margaretha) works as a fruit seller, spending her days at her fruit stall. One day, she meets a man named Eki (Naufal Samudra), who has a phobia of mangoes. Strangely, he insists on ordering mangoes and asks Ziya to pick them for him.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 601
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: Makan Seblak Pake Nangka, Meski Galak Aku Tetap Suka
programme.desc: Naya has always been a loyal fan of an artist named Rama. She spends hours watching his movies and following his latest news on social media. She has no idea that their paths will cross in the most unexpected way. One sunny day, while Naya was busy selling goods, Rama accidentally bumped into her cart. Stunned and surprised, Naya couldn't believe her eyes. The person she admired was standing right in front of her.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 147
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cek Khodam Cewek Doger Monyet
programme.desc: Rendy (Fendy Chow) and Arum (Soraya Rasyid) argue after Arum insists that her monkey is not chasing Rendy. Feeling exhausted, Rendy gets angry, and they clash. As time passes, they grow closer, and Rendy eventually confesses his feelings for Arum.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 601
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: REBUTAN HATI MISS UNI CORN
programme.desc: NETTY and SARA are two best friends who have been together since childhood. They do everything together. They have the same taste in everything, from matching clothes to being mistaken for sisters. Netty's mother also considers Sara as her own child, especially since Sara is an orphan who lives with her elderly uncle. Sara's uncle owns a corn farm that supplies corn for grilling at the peak. Meanwhile, Netty's mother runs an Indomie noodle stall, where Netty also works.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 68
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Warteg Bintang Lima Tapi Kamu Yang Utama
programme.desc: Babe Ali’s daughter (Ersya Aurelia) runs a small warteg (local food stall) business offering a cheap promotion: three side dishes with rice for only Rp20,000. She often clashes with a wealthy "mama’s boy" (Kevin Hillers) who mocks her tomboyish nature and her overenthusiastic way of running the business. However, their frequent arguments turn into mutual affection, even though her father warns her to stay away from him.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 148
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Dihadapan Ikan Semua Cintamu Menyala Abangkuh
programme.desc: berkisah tentang seorang gadis cantik bernama Gina. Diceritakan kalau Gina sangat syok, karena mendadak dia ditagih utang oleh rentenir, sementara mamaknya pun kabur, karena tidak sanggup membayar hutang. Pada akhirnya Gina mengunjungi kakeknya, yang memiliki usaha ikan. Di sana Gina pun bekerja keras. Namun ternyata Gina bertemu dengan cowok resek bernama Bagas. Di sana, Bagas terus saja mengolok-olok Gina

programme.title: Dihadapan Ikan Semua Cintamu Menyala Abangkuh
programme.desc: Beautiful Gina’s world is turned upside down when debt collectors suddenly harass her. To make matters worse, her mother disappears, unable to settle their debts. Can Gina survive the fish market and Bagas’s constant teasing?

programme.desc: Alex (22) and Rendy (23) have been inseparable best friends since childhood. Despite growing up in the same neighborhood, their lives are worlds apart; Alex comes from a wealthy family, while Rendy has been an orphan living alone since he was eight. Having raised himself to be independent, Rendy is treated like a second son by Alex's parents. For Alex, Rendy isn't just a best friend-he's the older brother he never had

programme.desc: Supri’s quiet village becomes a film set, and thanks to his martial arts skills, he’s cast as an actor. He soon falls for the leading lady, Jihan. When he confesses his feelings, Jihan challenges him: 'Is it love or just admiration?' Things take a dark turn when a village girl obsessed with Supri frames him for a scandal. Furious, Jihan and her team demand that Supri be kicked off the production. How will Supri clear his name?

programme.title: Despatch
programme.desc: Veteran crime journalist Joy feels outdated in a hyper-digital world. Chasing a fresh story, he uncovers buried truths that challenge power, media ethics, and his conscience deeply forever. Release Year: 2024 Director: Kanu Behl.

programme.title: Love, Sitara
programme.desc: Sitara, who avoided marriage all her life, suddenly proposes to Arjun, shocking her family in Kerala and uncovering secrets that change everything they believed. Release Year: 2024 Director: Vandana Kataria

programme.title: Nill Battey Sannata
programme.desc: A strong-willed mother pushes her daughter to chase her dreams, guiding her through setbacks, self-doubt, and hope as their bond grows stronger through every challenge. Release Year: 2015 Director: Ashwiny Iyer Tiwari

programme.title: Table No. 21
programme.desc: A couple is thrilled to participate in a game show with a huge cash prize, until they find out that the questions ironically tie back to an important chapter of their lives and that the only way to survive is to complete the game. Release Year: 2013 Director: Aditya Datt Awards: 2 nominations

programme.title: Go Goa Gone
programme.desc: Friends seeking thrill at a Goa rave reach a deserted island, only to face a terrifying zombie outbreak that turns their party into a desperate fight to stay alive. Release Year: 2013 Director: Raj and D.K. Awards: 2013 Winner ASIN Award- Best Cinematographer- Dan Macarthur

programme.title: Baa Baaa Black Sheep
programme.desc: Baa Baaa Black Sheep is a 2018 Indian action comedy film, starring Anupam Kher, Manish Paul, Annu Kapoor, Manjari Phadnis and Kay Kay Menon in a lead roles. Release Year: 2018 Director: Vishwas Paandya

programme.title: Ek Aur Ek Gyarah
programme.desc: Two small-time thieves are forced into kidnapping a child to save someone they love, facing fear, guilt, and a desperate race to find a way out without harming anyone. Release Year: 2003 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: In rural India, an honest police officer takes on brutal caste crimes, risking his life and career as he challenges corruption, violence, and deep-rooted injustice. Release Year: 2019 Director: Anubhav Sinha Awards: Best Director Critics- Anubhav Sinha, Best Actor Critics- Ayushmann Khurrana

programme.title: Koi Mil Gaya
programme.desc: Rohit, a mentally challenged youth, forms a bond with a gentle alien, and when police hunt it down, he risks everything to protect his only true friend from being taken away. Release Year: 2003 Director: Rakesh Roshan

programme.title: Gadar 2
programme.desc: When Tara Singh vanishes during a battle and is believed captured, his son Jeete risks everything to rescue him, facing deadly dangers to bring his father home. Release Year: 2023 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Baa Baaa Black Sheep
programme.desc: Baa Baaa Black Sheep is a 2018 Indian action comedy film, starring Anupam Kher, Manish Paul, Annu Kapoor, Manjari Phadnis and Kay Kay Menon in a lead roles. Release Year: 2018 Director: Vishwas Paandya

programme.title: Ek Aur Ek Gyarah
programme.desc: Two small-time thieves are forced into kidnapping a child to save someone they love, facing fear, guilt, and a desperate race to find a way out without harming anyone. Release Year: 2003 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: In rural India, an honest police officer takes on brutal caste crimes, risking his life and career as he challenges corruption, violence, and deep-rooted injustice. Release Year: 2019 Director: Anubhav Sinha Awards: Best Director Critics- Anubhav Sinha, Best Actor Critics- Ayushmann Khurrana

programme.title: Pukar
programme.desc: Unaware of his best friend Anjali's feeling Major Jaidev fall for Pooja. Release Year: 2000 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: 2001 Nominee Filmfare AwardBest ActorAnil Kapoor

programme.title: Badhaai Ho Badhaai
programme.desc: Anjali and Steven fall in love and elope. This brings an end to the friendship between the two families. Release Year: 2002 Director: Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Shaadi Se Pehle
programme.desc: Ashish is head over heels for Rani, but her parents aren't having it because he's unemployed. Everything changes when he lands a job, winning their approval at last! Release Year: 2006 Director: Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Go Goa Gone
programme.desc: Friends seeking thrill at a Goa rave reach a deserted island, only to face a terrifying zombie outbreak that turns their party into a desperate fight to stay alive. Release Year: 2013 Director: Raj and D.K. Awards: 2013 Winner ASIN Award- Best Cinematographer- Dan Macarthur

programme.title: Raaz
programme.desc: Sanjana and Aditya go to Ooty for a holiday to save their unsteady marriage. However, Sanjana is haunted by a spirit who reveals some dark secrets about Aditya and his past.

programme.title: Kya Bolti Tu?
programme.desc: A young woman breaks up with her boyfriend when she learns he does not believe in true love, but her next boyfriend is not a perfect match either.

programme.title: An Evening In Paris
programme.desc: A wealthy woman meets a charming but not completely truthful beau in France.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Ludo
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Khandani Shafakhana
programme.desc: Babita Bedi working as a medical representative and the only earner in the house. She has to run a fertility clinic for six months in order to sell it or else she will lose everything.

programme.title: Jalebi
programme.desc: A woman boards an overnight train and gets placed in a compartment with her former lover and his wife.

programme.title: The Diplomat
programme.desc: Follows an Indian diplomat who tries to repatriate an Indian girl from foreign land, where she was presumably forced and deceived into marrying against her will.

programme.title: Tuesdays & Fridays
programme.desc: Two millennials get into a relationship where they are allowed to meet only on 'Tuesdays , Fridays'.

programme.title: Jhootha Kahin Ka
programme.desc: Karan and Varun go to Mauritius to study but decide to stay back as they enjoy their new lifestyle. However, things take an unusual turn when their parents come to stay with them.

programme.title: Pati Patni Aur Woh - 2019
programme.desc: Chintu Tyagi is an ordinary, middle class man who finds himself torn between his wife and another woman.

programme.title: Mumbai Saga
programme.desc: The plot of the movie is set in the era of the 80s and 90s which were marked as a transformed period of Mumbai.

programme.title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkar
programme.desc: To earn extra cash, Mickey helps couples break up. However, life gets complicated when he falls for Tinni, a career woman with an independent streak.

programme.title: Sukhee
programme.desc: Fed up with her mundane existence, a housewife gets to relive the past while attending a school reunion.

programme.title: Section 375
programme.desc: A filmmaker stands trial when a costume assistant on his movie accuses him of rape.

programme.title: Karm
programme.desc: Asha and Arvind live together and soon start making plans for the new addition in the family. What she does not know is that Arvind has met a young woman named Neelam Shukla who wants to marry him.

programme.title: Firangi
programme.desc: In 1920 during India's freedom movement, one man firmly believes the British are not as bad as everyone believes.

programme.title: Mulk
programme.desc: One family member tries to help her own family when they are trapped in a dark controversy.

programme.title: Malaal
programme.desc: Two very different people from contrasting backgrounds experience the innocence of love.

programme.title: Paagalpanti
programme.desc: A tourist group from India sets out on a vacation to only have their trip to turn into a patriotic mission. Will it end well for them?

programme.title: Darling (why This Kolavari)
programme.desc: Raghav's marriage plans are disrupted by his wife's multiple personalities. However, he grows through this experience, learns about love and finds unexpected joy in life.

programme.title: Param Sundari
programme.desc: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.

programme.title: Hit- The First Case
programme.desc: A brilliant but troubled police inspector sets out to solve a confounding case, all while fighting to gain clarity into his troubled past.

programme.title: Ustad Hotel
programme.desc: Faisi wants to go to UK to become a professional chef but circumstances force him to assist his grandfather in a small restaurant in Kozhikode city, changing his outlook on life forever.

programme.title: Muthazhagu - EP 104
programme.desc: A hardworking young girl loses her cattle to financial hardship, but instead of surrendering to fate, she bravely chooses to confront her struggles and shape her own destiny.

programme.title: Paranthu Sella Vaa
programme.desc: An incurable romantic in Singapore spins tall tales to impress friends, but when fiction starts becoming reality, he must untangle his web of lies, learning lessons along the way.

programme.title: Poongodi
programme.desc: Poongodi rises above her father's male chauvinism, intent on proving herself & pursuing a college education. Her path crosses with Saravanan, a naïve young man who blindly trusts his manipulative stepmother. Uncover the fate of the two kindred souls.

programme.title: Punitha
programme.desc: Maragatham holds her step-daughter Punitha dear, to the point of being overbearing. However, their bond turns twisted & burdened when Punitha finds her soulmate, Kabilan. Amidst family betrayals, can Punitha show her mother the true meaning of love?

programme.title: MANAMAGALE VAA
programme.desc: Narmada's mission to her ancestral village to reunite her father & his estranged family entwines with Kathir's task of finding suitable grooms for his three sisters. What unfolds when they fall in love, striving for a cause against the same enemy?

programme.title: PUTHU VASANTHAM
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: LAKSHMI
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Annam

programme.title: Marumagal
programme.desc: Aathirai's unyielding passion for helping others constantly lands her in trouble, while Prabhu's self-serving actions show disregard for his own family's well-being. Follow their tumultuous journeys as fate brings them together in marriage.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: The life of a simple flower farm girl is shattered when she falls for a charming accountant, who turns out to be a married gun cartel member. Targeted for his stolen money, she loses everything she holds dear and reinvents herself to seek justice.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The lives of four individuals are turned upside down after they witness the murder of their friend. They band together to put the alleged killer behind bars, but years later, the imprisoned man seeks revenge, unraveling dark secrets that test their loyalty and survival.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. programme.desc: The life of a simple flower farm girl is shattered when she falls for a charming accountant, who turns out to be a married gun cartel member. Targeted for his stolen money, she loses everything she holds dear and reinvents herself to seek justice.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: Being a prominent political clan, the Sagrados want nothing but to keep their name faultless and sacred, until a controversial incident comes their way.

programme.title: Ngayon At Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva fights to reclaim her place in the wealthy Cortes family while searching for the truth about her identity. Fate brings her together with Inno, and their love story endures family secrets, rivalry and tragedy as they discover the real meaning of forgiveness and redemption.

programme.title: Last Dance
programme.desc: Aged 75 Germain, a contemplative home-body, finds himself widowed and having to cope with his children's somewhat invasive concern about him. programme.title: 47 Pouces

programme.title: A La Fontaine
programme.desc: Alice is at a crucial stage of her high school life: she has to determine her future career and choose a university. Stressed, she turns to her favorite teacher and her best friend, Julien. But Julien does not answer her messages.

programme.title: Le Code - EP 3
programme.desc: Believing she is defending a wealthy client, Jeanne insists that Claire is also present for a murder trial... Nadia tries to assist a client who is a drug addict and now pregnant. But how far can you go in helping someone against their will?

programme.title: Le Code - EP 4
programme.desc: Nadia and Maxime defend a police officer accused of causing the death of a man in custody. Claire sees an unexpected client arrive at the office: her mother. Chloe finds a friend present on the evening of her accident and whose testimony could change the course of her trial.

programme.title: Meurtres En Champagne
programme.desc: When Madame Dupaquier is found murdered in her own champagne cellars, Inspector Guerini and Constable Delorme head the investigation. Given the labyrinth of tunnels connecting the cellars and the cryptic inscription left by the murderer, they call on Bastien Keller for help. Unfortunately the specialist geologist is currently serving time!

programme.desc: The Arctic Ocean, the smallest of the planet's five oceans, is severely affected by climate change. The consequences of rising temperatures are global. In Canada, Diego Bunuel dives under the ice to discover a fascinating, extreme, and largely unknown world.

programme.title: Movie - Murattu Kaalai
programme.desc: Although Kaalaiyan and his brothers can afford a luxurious lifestyle, they choose to live modestly. However, Sundaravelu is a devious man who tries to grab their land.

programme.title: Movie - Aayudham
programme.desc: Siva, a medical college student, falls in love with his classmate Mahalakshmi. Trouble begins when he fights against a gangster who also falls in love with Mahalakshmi.

programme.title: Movie - Penn Puthi Munn Puthi
programme.desc: A woman stops the wedding of a happy-go-lucky man and tells him that she is trying to save his innocent parents who are in prison.

programme.title: Movie - Neelakuyil
programme.desc: Muthusamy, a poor vagabond, falls in love with Shalini, a blind flower seller, and works hard to afford a surgery to restore her eyesight. However, circumstances change drastically for both of them.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Uttama Purushan
programme.desc: Raghu, a married man, tries to have an extra-marital affair with his secretary and asks her to come to a hotel room. However, he gets accused of murdering a woman who stayed in the neighbouring room.

programme.title: Movie - Oru Malarin Payanam
programme.desc: Nandhini and Sudha are devoted sisters. Sudha is overdependent on Nandhini. Nandhini wants Murthy, an employee in her company, to marry Sudha but he politely declines, citing a conflict in status.

programme.title: Movie - Vidukathai
programme.desc: Anandhi is raised by her father who is a fearless man. Neelakandan, a 40-year-old bachelor who is a tenant, becomes the only comforting factor when her father dies.

programme.title: Movie - Varna Jalam
programme.desc: Daniel, a young man, wins over the heart of retired IPS officer Devanathan and his family. Soon, Daniel puts his plan into action which threatens to destroy their family.

programme.title: Movie - Pottu Amman
programme.desc: A black magician kills 27 babies, each born under a different star, to attain extraordinary powers. However, he realises that he has to kill one more baby, born under a rare star, to become omnipotent. Pottu Amman comes to rescue the baby from the black magician.

programme.title: Movie - Then Paandi Cheemayile
programme.desc: An archaeologist learns about a village that is under the reign of three brothers. He decides to destroy their power and end their influence on the villagers.

programme.title: Movie - Vaazhndu Kattuvom
programme.desc: This movie stars Ramki, Gautami and Chinni Jayanth, and is directed by R Krishnamurthy.

programme.title: Movie - Akkarai Cheemayile
programme.desc: Akkarai Seemaiyile is a Tamil feature film starring Saravanan and Devaghi.

programme.title: Movie - Dost
programme.desc: Vishwa's best friend Raghu betrays him for money and gets him arrested for a crime he did not commit. Soon after his release, Vishwa seeks revenge and decides to commit the crime he was jailed for.

programme.title: Movie - Vetri Mel Vetri
programme.desc: Kumar leads an aimless life and falls in love with Janaki. He later goes on to become a renowned boxer. His marriage life with Janaki runs smooth, until Janaki's friend Ramya enters their life.

programme.title: Movie - Naan Petha Mahaney
programme.desc: Aandal, a possessive mother, sabotages her son's love life by attempting suicide. When she gets him married to a village girl, her possessiveness resurfaces.

programme.title: Movie - Ah Ahh
programme.desc: Anasuya, the daughter of a rich woman, falls in love with Aanand. However, they face several obstacles while trying to convince their families about their relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Sudhesi
programme.desc: Sudhesi stumbles upon a plot involving a corrupt state CM and his right-hand man through a CD containing incriminating evidence. He decides to use the opportunity for the good of the people.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 20
programme.desc: This week's Big Interview sees two of Chelsea's biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. Considered one of the most technically gifted players the Premier League has ever seen, Gianfranco Zola visits the Chelsea training ground to talk to the man currently lighting up the Premier League, Cole Palmer, about various aspects of his game.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 9
programme.desc: Since joining Liverpool in 2023, Cody Gakpo has become a key figure at Anfield - playing a major role in their Premier League title win last season. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Netherlands international to learn about his rise, at the PSV academy from the age of six, to winning one of football's biggest prizes.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2024/2025 (LIV)
programme.desc: Relive another extraordinary Premier League campaign as Liverpool soared to an historic 20th league title, Nottingham Forest defied expectations and the promoted sides were strenuously challenged. There were also tactical transformations, shifts in narrative trends, and a more open field than ever before. Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 05 JAN
programme.desc: We look back at all the goals and key action from a bumper Matchweek 20 in the Premier League, including City against Chelsea, Leeds v Man Utd, and leaders Arsenal's trip to Bournemouth.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2010/2011 season.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2010/2011 (GB: TEVEZ & BERBATOV)
programme.desc: We take a look back at some of the most spectacular and important goals from previous Premier League seasons.

programme.title: REVIEW - FRI 09 JAN
programme.desc: The Review show wraps up every match and every goal from the final round of a busy festive period, which culminates in Arsenal against Liverpool.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2016/2017 season.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2016/2017 (CHE)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Considered a legend at Stamford Bridge, John Terry won no fewer than five League titles at Chelsea as well as lifting the F.A. Cup five times and the Champions League trophy. We find out what set him apart from his peers and where he rates amongst the very best in the World.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: With 6 Premier League titles to his name, Rio Ferdinand is widely regarded as one of the best defenders to have played in the League. We sit down with the Englishman to discuss the moments that made him a legend and helped him rightly earn his place in the Premier League Hall of Fame.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 30
programme.desc: Three decades on from Manchester United's iconic Class of '92, PL Stories steps beyond the headline names to rediscover the teammates who shared the same dressing room, dreams, and demands of one of football's most revered youth systems. We sit down with the lesser-known graduates who lived that journey first-hand, players whose paths diverged from the global spotlight but whose experiences offer a rare and revealing window into the reality behind the legend.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 36
programme.desc: In the heart of Ecuador, we sit down with Antonio Valencia as he reflects on an extraordinary journey from humble beginnings to the grand stages of world football. Against the backdrop of the streets and stadiums that shaped him, he recounts his rise through adversity, his explosive emergence in the Premier League with Wigan, and his evolution into a title-winning, Champions League-chasing leader at Manchester United.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2012/2013 (MNU)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2012/2013 (GB:RVP)
programme.desc: We take a look back at some of the most spectacular and important goals from previous Premier League seasons.

programme.title: PL 100 - ROBIN VAN PERSIE
programme.desc: Premier League 100, celebrates some of the leading names to have achieved iconic milestones within England's top flight. From scoring over 100 goals, to making over 100 clean sheets, we speak to the legends that left their mark and reflect on the goals and saves that set them apart from their rivals

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2011/2012 season.

programme.title: REVIEW - FRI 09 JAN
programme.desc: The Review show wraps up every match and every goal from the final round of a busy festive period, which culminates in Arsenal against Liverpool.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 18
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the best teams in Premier League history, we speak to the players who formed part of the Arsenal Invincibles of the 2003-04 season and hear about the behind the scenes stories and funny anecdotes from that unforgettable league win. With contributions from Thierry Henry, Patrick Vieira, Dennis Bergkamp, Freddie Ljungberg, Ray Parlour and Martin Keown.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 43
programme.desc: We join Willian in Gremio, Brazil, where he is currently continuing his playing career, as he reflects on an incredible journey in the Premier League. Sharing insights from his time at Chelsea and that controversial move across London to Arsenal and then Fulham, Willian opens up about the highs, challenges and defining moments that shaped his career at the top level of English football.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 5
programme.desc: Leicester City's Premier League triumph is one of the greatest underdog stories in the history of sport. Wes Morgan and Marc Albrighton recount the pivotal moments that defined their remarkable journey to the title.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 17
programme.desc: A tale of two seasons - Gary Cahill recalls the Chelsea championship campaigns of 2014/15 under Jose Mourinho, and 2016/17 with Antonio Conte at the helm.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 16
programme.desc: Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink was one of the most prolific strikers English football has ever seen. The two time Golden Boot winner looks back on his time at Leeds United and Chelsea, revisiting his greatest goals and most memorable matches.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: He was recently inducted into the exclusive Premier League Hall of fame, but what made Tony Adams so special? We sit down with 'Mr Arsenal' to discuss his stand out moments in the English top flight and chat to his teammates that knew him to find out what really made him tick.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 20 JAN
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 22, kicking off with the Manchester derby, we then turn to Chelsea against Brentford, before Monday night's finale as Brighton face Bournemouth.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2009/2010 season.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 10
programme.desc: Michael Owen burst onto the scene for Liverpool at just seventeen years of age, and in two consecutive seasons the teenage sensation won the Premier League Golden Boot. Owen recalls those campaigns for the Reds, reliving the key moments that helped him develop into one of the greatest players of his generation.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 17
programme.desc: A tale of two seasons - Gary Cahill recalls the Chelsea championship campaigns of 2014/15 under Jose Mourinho, and 2016/17 with Antonio Conte at the helm.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 43
programme.desc: We join Willian in Gremio, Brazil, where he is currently continuing his playing career, as he reflects on an incredible journey in the Premier League. Sharing insights from his time at Chelsea and that controversial move across London to Arsenal and then Fulham, Willian opens up about the highs, challenges and defining moments that shaped his career at the top level of English football.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 33
programme.desc: With 87 goals to his name Danny Welbeck is the fifth-highest goalscorer among active Premier League players, and across a career spanning 17 seasons he has seen it all. This week, the Brighton striker sits down with former teammate Owen Hargreaves to reflect on his remarkable journey. From his early days at Manchester United and being crowned champion in 2013, to his move to Arsenal where he overcame adversity, and now to his current role thriving as a leader for the Seagulls.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 31
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 8
programme.desc: We celebrate the unique legacy of footballing dynasties in the Premier League; where talent, passion, and pride are passed from one generation to the next. From the iconic saves of Peter Schmeichel to the rise of his son Kasper, the goal-scoring legacy of Ian Wright carried on by son's Shaun and Bradley, and the Lampards' deep-rooted Chelsea connection, this episode explores the bonds that tie football families together.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 19
programme.desc: We chart the remarkable journey of one of the Premier League's most iconic midfielders, Yaya Toure, from his humble beginnings in Bouake, Ivory Coast, to his rise through European football's elite clubs. We sit down with Toure to discuss his development at ASEC Mimosas, his path playing with the likes of Monaco and Barcelona, and his eventual arrival at Manchester City, where he became a driving force behind the club's transformation into a football powerhouse.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 7
programme.desc: Former Premier League enforcer Kolo Toure joins Will Perry in the locker room as he unveils his top 10 Premier League moments.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 14
programme.desc: Aaron Ramsey was one of Arsenal's key players for a decade under Arsene Wenger. The Welshman's influence and technical ability made him one of the Premier League's standout talents in midfield. He looks back on some of his highlights.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 33
programme.desc: We look back at all the very best moments of the 2025/2026 season so far. An action-packed show filled with exciting Premier League programming and digital content.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2020/2021 (MNC)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: FS MMA Mario Rinaldi vs. Mark Burch
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Mario Rinaldi looks to extend his winning streak against Mark Burch in this rematch which takes place in beautiful Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams I
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features middleweights Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (44-1, 24 KOs) vs. Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (37-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on December 5, 2009. The result was a controversial majority decision, and the two would eventually square off in a rematch about a year later.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Michael Katsidis
programme.desc: This episode features lightweight champion Juan Manuel Marquez defending against Michael Katsidis, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Hohhot Grand Prix, and stop to get to know the world's #1 ranked fighter Aleksandar Kukolj. We then head to Russia to witness the effect that Judo has on the Russian people.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs Orlando Lora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman facing off with Orlando Lora. A left hook and right uppercut combination ends this fight. Also on the card, action from former heavyweight champion James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Mitakeumi, Goeido, Okinoumi and Takakeisho from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Weapons as well as Girl's Forms and Team Demo highlights.

programme.title: WCCB Tim Tszyu vs. Sebastian Fundora
programme.desc: From the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, undefeated Super Welterweight World Champion Tim Tszyu travels from Australia to defend his title against former World Champion Sebastian Fundora. Fundora stands 6'5", and is known for his all-action and exciting style. He replaces an injured Keith Thurman, and jumps into a World Title match-up against one of boxing's rising stars in Tszyu.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 5: Marseille, France - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Savate and the Martial Art of Hands and Feet with Masters Christian Robert, Frank May, Frederic Baret, Laurent Bois and Patrick Gellat.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Sergio Mora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing off with Sergio Mora with a highly disputed and controversial decision you will have to see to believe! The two never had a rematch. Also on the card, action from WBC Super Welterweight champ Jermell Charlo.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Kakuryu, Ichinojo, Daieisho and Koteoko from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Canelo Alvarez vs. Carlos Baldomir
programme.desc: This episode features then-WBC silver light middleweight champion Saul (Canelo) Alvarez looking to give Carlos Baldomir his first career KO loss, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features ring girl Arianny Celeste making a high schooler's dreams come true when she goes as his date to his prom. Also, we catch up with Clay Guida and Urijah Faber at the LA Fit Expo and we go behind the scenes for an intimate photo shoot with beautiful ring girl Amber Nicole.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Darren Daniel vs. Dricus Du Plessis
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts in South Africa including two Middleweights Darren "Double D" Daniel and Dricus "Stillknocks" Du Plessis who will meet in the hex for middleweight supremacy. Bonus coverage includes Alain Ilunga vs. Sydney Mokgolo and Themba Gorimbo vs. Alex Cheboub.

programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts in South Africa including two Middleweights Darren "Double D" Daniel and Dricus "Stillknocks" Du Plessis who will meet in the hex for middleweight supremacy. Bonus coverage includes Alain Ilunga vs. Sydney Mokgolo and Themba Gorimbo vs. Alex Cheboub.

programme.title: WCCB Tim Tszyu vs. Sebastian Fundora
programme.desc: From the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, undefeated Super Welterweight World Champion Tim Tszyu travels from Australia to defend his title against former World Champion Sebastian Fundora. Fundora stands 6'5", and is known for his all-action and exciting style. He replaces an injured Keith Thurman, and jumps into a World Title match-up against one of boxing's rising stars in Tszyu.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 5: Marseille, France - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Savate and the Martial Art of Hands and Feet with Masters Christian Robert, Frank May, Frederic Baret, Laurent Bois and Patrick Gellat.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Sergio Mora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing off with Sergio Mora with a highly disputed and controversial decision you will have to see to believe! The two never had a rematch. Also on the card, action from WBC Super Welterweight champ Jermell Charlo.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Kakuryu, Ichinojo, Daieisho and Koteoko from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Canelo Alvarez vs. Carlos Baldomir
programme.desc: This episode features then-WBC silver light middleweight champion Saul (Canelo) Alvarez looking to give Carlos Baldomir his first career KO loss, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features ring girl Arianny Celeste making a high schooler's dreams come true when she goes as his date to his prom. Also, we catch up with Clay Guida and Urijah Faber at the LA Fit Expo and we go behind the scenes for an intimate photo shoot with beautiful ring girl Amber Nicole.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Darren Daniel vs. Dricus Du Plessis
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts in South Africa including two Middleweights Darren "Double D" Daniel and Dricus "Stillknocks" Du Plessis who will meet in the hex for middleweight supremacy. Bonus coverage includes Alain Ilunga vs. Sydney Mokgolo and Themba Gorimbo vs. Alex Cheboub.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former champions Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (38-1, 27 KOs) and 'El Asesino' Kermit Cintron (32-2, 28 KOs) in a middleweight battle. The fight took place at the Home Depot Center in Carson, California, USA, on May 8, 2010.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Darren Barker
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a middleweight title fight between champion Sergio Martinez and up-and-coming European middleweight Darren Baker that ends with a right hook blast. Also on the card, action from 5-time champion Timothy Bradley.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Takakeisho, Hakuho, Hokutofuji and Tamawashi from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 8: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu and the Martial Art of Grappling with Masters Renato Barreto and Breno Sivak.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'rocket' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Zim and Zam have discovered the lost city of Micro OKIDO.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo are great at picking apples with Mojo's crane top. But Preston's drone might be even better... until it accidentally scoops up Felix. Mojo and Bo are on the chase!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: Glitch and his Glitchbots pretend to be the Go Jetters.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 27
programme.desc: It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 30
programme.desc: Bluey and Mackenzie are excited to spend time with their two buddies Mia and Captain; when the older kids run off to play together without them, Calypso explains that growing up can be hard.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 42
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Andy's heads to the island of Barbados to help rescue some baby Hawksbill turtles.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: When Egg, the cheeky little chick, goes on the run again, Duggee whistles to get him back. Hang on a minute Duggee, what was that noise? A whistle? The squirrels want to learn how to whistle.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: When the Squirrels find Duggee playing the saxophone, they want to have a go too. Several pots, balloons, tins, tubes and some water later and the Squirrels are making music. And boy, are they LOUD!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save the White Cliffs of Dover when Glitch digs for classroom chalk

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 21
programme.desc: When Thomas finds out that the Earl's Technology Fair will bring new inventions to Sodor, he fears the Sodor engines will be replaced by new technology.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Seamus has booked the wrong date for his and Little Woo's holiday. Stanley repurposes the locations of the town into activities and sights to give them a holiday in a day.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together.

programme.desc: Jayden is listening to Papa read a story about 'Anansi the Spider'. He likes it so much, that he wants to make an Anansi Spider himself.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: JoJo, Gran Gran and Panda are helping Cynthia in her garden - JoJo loves how tall the sunflowers are. Cynthia gives JoJo a present of some sunflower seeds - JoJo can keep them ready to plant and grow more sunflowers next year.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 30
programme.desc: Duggee is painting in his favourite colouring book. The Squirrels want to have a go too.

Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2

Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 20

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 20

programme.desc: When Marcus leaves for sleep-away camp, Phoebe discovers that being a "family fairy" means helping everyone in your assigned family, not just the children. / When Tracy hires Cassie to babysit Nicholas, and Eden asks Athena and Phoebe to lend a helping hand, Cassie and the Dews must find a way to get Nicholas to bed without his missing and beloved penguin stuffy.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 1

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 2

programme.desc: Huzzah! Gabby the Bold and Pandy the Purr-owd are Knights in Training, and they head into the dollhouse for the Royal Knighting Ceremony. programme.title: Mountain Men (S12) - EP 6

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: A young man stabs another man who assaulted his brother and attempted to steal from their family-run petrol station. Was it attempted murder or self defence?

programme.desc: JaRay Wilson texted her mother just minutes before she vanished. For over a year, the teen's friends, family, and community searched for answers.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 49
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S5 - EP 1
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets California’s First Couple, Governor Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom, visiting their home in Marin County and offices in Sacramento to see how they work together.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 2
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Snap CEO Evan Spiegel in Los Angeles for a conversation about his entrepreneurial journey, building Snap and his latest consumer hardware bet.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 3
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Alexis Ohanian at Athlos NYC, an annual women's track and field event. They discuss his athletics portfolio, venture career and what really happened when he left Reddit.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 4
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Reese Witherspoon and the Hello Sunshine executive team to discuss the company's founding mission and what's next for Hollywood.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Disney Entertainment Co-Chair Dana Walden and a cast of Disney stars for an inside look at the entertainment giant's global streaming and TV operations.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Emily goes inside Stargate, an historic $500 billion bet on the future of AI. She speaks with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman & Softbank CEO Masayoshi Son about their hopes for the project.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Emily goes inside Stargate, an historic $500 billion bet on the future of AI. She speaks with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman & Softbank CEO Masayoshi Son about their hopes for the project.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Liquid Death was founded on the idea of breaking the norms of traditional marketing. We speak to CMO Dan Murphy about the water company's origin as a "sheep in wolf's clothing."

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We speak with Pranav Yadav, CEO of Neuro-Insight, about the marketing intelligence his company is gleaning from neuroscience.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Lisa McKnight, Mattel's chief brand officer, has been at the forefront of reviving the iconic Barbie. Now the famous toy brand has launched itself beyond store shelves and onto the silver screen.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: McLaren Racing CEO Zak Brown discusses the technology, data and effort required to propel the McLaren brand onto the modern F1 stage and into living rooms around the globe.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Stephan Pretorious, chief technology officer of WPP, unpacks the world of generative artificial intelligence and its potential impact, both positive and negative, on marketing.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: From immersive experiences to live streaming, National Women's Soccer League Chief Marketing and Commercial Officer Julie Haddon discusses the opportunities for growing women's professional sports.

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are "under surveillance" as we cover the latest in finance, economics and investment. Join Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: Power Players S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Jason Kelly follows Pierre Gasly from Alpine Headquarters to a Paris photo shoot to get a firsthand look at how the business of being an F1 driver goes far beyond the track.

programme.title: Power Players S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Jason Kelly heads to Maranello, Italy, to speak with Ferrari's leadership about the coming regulatory changes for Formula 1 and how Ferrari's racing technology informs the road cars of today.

programme.title: Power Players S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Miami Grand Prix Managing Partner Tom Garfinkel tackles the complexities of putting on the race, and F1 CEO Stefano Domenicali reveals why it's key to F1's future growth.

programme.title: Power Players S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Williams Team Principal James Vowles and F1 Academy drivers' champion Abbi Pulling show how advanced simulation is shaping the future of Formula 1.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Ji Chaoqun was a promising young engineer from Beijing heading to the US to study. Then China’s spy agency came calling with bags of cash, the promise of glory and an offer that would change his life forever.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Bloomberg Investigates takes viewers on an immersive journey to the heart of our most powerful reporting. Each investigation is recounted by award-winning journalists.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: This is the story of how an Arizona woman's house became a gateway for North Korea's IT operatives - an underground "laptop farm" that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S5 - EP 5
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits South Korea to explore how it became a cultural and tech superpower. She trains with a Taekwondo blackbelt, learns kimchi secrets from a grandmaster and dives into pro gaming.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas. She decodes the Parthenon's geometry, sails the Aegean with ancient tools and is swept up in a riotous festival.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hannah Fry journeys to Ireland, her ancestral homeland, tracing the impact of the nation's modern economic transformation and its connections to the land and sea.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals how Iceland's geological extremes help shape its culture. She meets scientists predicting lava flows and harnessing geothermal power, and even rides along ancient Viking trails.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Hannah explores Vietnam. From the vibrancy of Ho Chi Minh City to a muddy prawn harvest in the Mekong Delta and the misty hilltops of Sapa, she reveals a nation embracing change.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Hannah Fry travels to Spain to decode its history and culture. She learns about the rhythms of flamenco, a mountain whistle language and the hidden symbolism in its urban planning.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.
